productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Unisex Casual Olive Backpack
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better bag you can find than this one from US Polo. Neatly designed with lots of organiser space and a laptop compartment, this bag makes for a great everyday option for college or office. Height: 41 cm Width: 29 cm Depth: 12 cm Made of polyester with a nylon lining for durability, toughness and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bag One main copiously spaced zippered compartment with padded laptop compartment and mesh pouch Zippered utility pocket on the front with organiser pouches, loop and mobile pouch US Polo badge appliquéd on the front Mesh pockets on the sides for carrying a sipper and essentials Synthetic haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable handles and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuries Care Hand wash Clean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not dry clean or machine wash, tumble dry, wring or line dry
